ops.title: Round 5 follow-ups: wall_of_text flaky negatives, cross-entry aggregation, cc-notes retrofit
ops.body:
Round 5 hands off three residuals from the round-4 sign-off (2026-07-05). Tasks live in their own repos; this doc is the cross-repo map.

## Tasks

| Task | Repo | Id | Priority |
|---|---|---|---|
| A — wall_of_text panel flaky negatives (nb04/nb05/nb06) | cc-skills | 2939d87 | P3 |
| B — design + implement cross-entry signal aggregation | captain-hook | f663b12 | P3 |
| C — retrofit cc-notes into pre-repo-bootstrap repos (cc-sentiment) | cc-skills | db21c0e | P3 |

Each task's description carries its full plan; read it with `cc-notes task show <id>` in that repo.

## Sequencing

A, B, C are mutually independent — any order, any parallelism. B contains a mid-task hard gate: the aggregation design must be reviewed with the user before implementation starts.

## Evidence

Task A's rubric panel is attached to cc-skills note `82b7af2` (tag `round5-panel`): `show-rubric-panel.tar.gz`, 16+ live-LLM cases with manifest and logs. Attachment content moves on `cc-notes sync` only — a plain `git fetch` brings the ref but not the bytes; if `cc-notes attachment path 82b7af2 show-rubric-panel.tar.gz` reports missing-locally, run `cc-notes sync` first.

## Environment state (verified 2026-07-05)

- capt-hook 8.5.0 on PyPI (UserPromptSubmit window scan, spawnllm>=0.5.5 floor)
- show pack 0.1.3 (window="turn" + f08 contrastive example), cc-present 0.2.1, cc-notes >=0.17.0, spawnllm 0.5.5
- cc-skills adopted cc-notes in round 5: init side effects on main as 9bbc597 (plugin registration + capt-hook pack)
- Adoption-gap verdict: cc-skills predates repo-bootstrap (founded 2026-06-05; the tool arrived 2026-06-06, its cc-notes step 2026-06-18 in eb96e75/d835c49) — never scaffolded, nothing to fix in the skill. Only other gapped repo: cc-sentiment (Task C).

## Pitfalls carried forward

- captain-hook, cc-notes, and cc-skills carry live parallel sessions; releases raced twice in round 4 (v8.4.1, cc-notes 0.17.0). Isolate tree changes in jj workspaces; fetch before push; re-verify tags AND the registry immediately before tagging.
- jj workspaces lack `.git` — the cc-notes CLI and prek fail inside them; run refs-only ops from the primary repo.
- Live-LLM flake measurement: fresh session_id per run, N>=10 per boundary, always A/B against an unchanged baseline — round 4's nb05 verdict flipped with sample size.
- Aggregation (Task B) shifts every signal-scored hook's sensitivity ecosystem-wide; consumer thresholds were tuned per-entry and will need dispositions.
- Bump `plugin.json` (not capt-hook.toml) for show-pack changes to propagate on re-fetch.
ops.when: when starting execution of the round-5 follow-ups (wall_of_text flaky negatives nb04/nb05/nb06, cross-entry signal aggregation, repo-bootstrap adoption gap / cc-notes retrofit)
